prompt: 生成圣斗士星矢12个黄金圣斗士的12宫格卡牌图片，每张卡牌上写上对应的中文名，每行4个，宽高比{argument name="比例" default="16:9"}。
translatedPrompt: Generate a 12-grid card image of the 12 Gold Saints from Saint Seiya, with each card labeled with the corresponding Chinese name, 4 per row, with an aspect ratio of {argument name="aspect ratio" default="16:9"}.

breakdown.creativeCore: Twelve Gold Saints Card Grid：A prompt to generate a 12-card grid featuring the Gold Saints from Saint Seiya, including their Chinese names and a specific 16:9 layout.
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
